# Test audio (Creative Commons)

This folder holds a short MP3 used by the API test suite so uploads, ID3 writes, and paths are exercised against real bytes.

## `scaryviolins-cc0-preview.mp3`

- **Work:** “ScaryViolins” (Freesound preview MP3 derived from the original upload)
- **Author:** [lennyboy](https://freesound.org/people/lennyboy/) on Freesound
- **Source page:** https://freesound.org/people/lennyboy/sounds/244417  
- **Direct preview URL (used for download):** https://cdn.freesound.org/previews/244/244417_2971247-hq.mp3  
- **License:** CC0 1.0 — https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/  
- **Discovery:** Openverse API with `license=cc0`

Only automated tests read this file; it is not distributed as sample music beyond the repo.
